calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Reset To Jan-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Maria Palomino, present in pro per, but unable to provide a Proof of Publication to the Court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to Jan. 26, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for an Original Proof of Publication.
